raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Offshore wind energy will play a crucial role in meeting California’s goal of achieving 100% renewable energy by 2045.",
    "Offshore wind energy has the potential to create a significant number of high-paying jobs in California.",
    "California will need over one million chargers to support the eight million electric vehicles anticipated on the road by 2030.",
    "Residential and commercial buildings will need upgrades and retrofitting to cut greenhouse gas emissions in California.",
    "Young people aging out of the foster care system frequently experience homelessness.",
    "The RHNA and SCS programs rely on inconsistent data and assumptions for sustainable housing development in California.",
    "Lack of adequate support in schools results in high dropout rates for LGBTQ+ students, leading to high rates of poverty and homelessness.",
    "The bill AB 383 will help reduce California’s current teacher shortage by helping classified school employees become fully credentialed teachers.",
    "Temporary employees often are not allowed to bargain alongside their permanent coworkers for wages and benefits."
  ]
}
```
